name: FLORENTINE BRAINROT #18
description: Florentine Brainrot #18 is a auction blood marble single-panel relic built around Mona Lisa and Y2K Auction Pop-Up Hell. Tarocchi Fiorentini assigns Asso di Spade, used here as the witness card. The Asso di Spade motif turns the whole panel into a little court exhibit. Cosimo approves the lighting and ignores the crime. Serial MONA-18 carries codon marker ATGTAAAACGCTCTCATATCTGCC; Gematria marks LOWTAPER at Σ 660.

attributes.value: a counterfeit museum audio guide yelling LFG
